entities.name: GRAIN LEGUMES
entities.description: Legumes used for grain production, serving as gene pools for stress resistance

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Stresses caused by living organisms such as pests and pathogens

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Stresses caused by non-living factors such as temperature and drought

entities.name: CROSSABILITY BARRIERS
entities.description: Biological obstacles that prevent hybridization between different species

entities.name: INTROGRESSION
entities.description: The transfer of genetic material from one species into the gene pool of another by repeated backcrossing

entities.name: PRIMARY GENE POOLS
entities.description: Groups of wild species that can easily cross with cultivated species

entities.name: SECONDARY GENE POOLS
entities.description: Groups of wild species that can cross with cultivated species with some difficulty

entities.name: TERTIARY GENE POOL
entities.description: Groups of wild species that are very difficult to cross with cultivated species

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A grain legume cultivated for food

entities.name: CICER RETICULATUM
entities.description: A wild relative of chickpea used for widening the genetic base

entities.name: C. ECHINOSPERMUM
entities.description: A wild relative of chickpea used for widening the genetic base

entities.name: PHYTOPHTHORA ROOT ROT
entities.description: A soil-borne disease affecting chickpea roots

entities.name: CYST NEMATODE
entities.description: A parasitic worm affecting chickpea, specifically Heterodera ciceri

entities.name: HETERODERA CICERI
entities.description: The scientific name for the cyst nematode affecting chickpea

entities.name: ROOT-LESION NEMATODE
entities.description: A parasitic worm affecting chickpea, specifically Pratylenchus spp.

entities.name: PRATYLENCHUS SPP
entities.description: The scientific name for root-lesion nematodes

entities.name: POD BORER
entities.description: An insect pest affecting chickpea, specifically Helicoverpa armigera

entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: The scientific name for the pod borer pest

entities.name: ASCOCHYTA BLIGHT
entities.description: A fungal disease affecting chickpea

entities.name: BOTRYTIS GREY MOULD
entities.description: A fungal disease affecting chickpea

entities.name: LOW TEMPERATURES
entities.description: An abiotic stress factor affecting chickpea growth

entities.name: CAJANUS SPECIES
entities.description: Wild species of the Cajanus genus used for trait development

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A condition where pollen is non-functional, used for hybrid production

entities.name: COMMERCIAL HYBRIDS
entities.description: Hybrid crops produced for commercial sale

entities.name: STERILITY MOSAIC
entities.description: A viral disease affecting legumes

entities.name: C. ACUTIFOLIUS
entities.description: A wild Cajanus species used for resistance to pests and diseases

entities.name: C. SCARABAEOIDES
entities.description: A wild Cajanus species used for resistance and protein content

entities.name: HIGH PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: A nutritional attribute introgressed from wild species

entities.name: PHASEOLUS BEANS
entities.description: A group of legume species including common beans

entities.name: P. COCCINEUS
entities.description: A wild Phaseolus species in the secondary gene pool

entities.name: P. DUMOSUS
entities.description: A wild Phaseolus species in the secondary gene pool

entities.name: P. ACUTIFOLIUS
entities.description: A wild Phaseolus species in the tertiary gene pool

entities.name: COMMON BEAN
entities.description: The cultivated species Phaseolus vulgaris

entities.name: P. VULGARIS
entities.description: The scientific name for the common bean

entities.name: CONGRUITY BACK CROSS SYSTEM
entities.description: A breeding method used to transfer genes from the tertiary gene pool

entities.name: LENTIL
entities.description: A grain legume cultivated for food

entities.name: ANTHRACNOSE
entities.description: A fungal disease affecting lentils

entities.name: WILT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist wilt diseases

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand water scarcity

entities.name: L. LAMOTTEI
entities.description: A wild lentil species used for introgression of resistance traits

entities.name: CLONING
entities.description: The process of isolating and copying a specific gene

entities.name: TRANSGENIC APPROACHES
entities.description: Methods used to transfer genes across species using biotechnology
